items.title: Cognitive Fluctuations, Neuropsychiatric Burden, and Quality of Life in Moderate-Advanced Dementia With Lewy Bodies: The Role of Dysautonomia.
items.abstract: Cognitive fluctuations are reported in 90% of individuals with dementia with Lewy bodies (DLB) and along with dysautonomia, are a key source of disability. Through this effort, we sought to investigate the relationship between autonomic burden and cognitive fluctuations, neuropsychiatric burden and quality of life in moderate-advanced DLB. This multicenter, prospective, observational, longitudinal cohort study, Predicting ACcurately End-of-Life in Dementia With Lewy Bodies and Promoting Quality End-of-Life Experiences (PACE-DLB), was conducted in the United States to study individuals with moderate-advanced DLB. The primary exposure for the current analysis was time-varying total autonomic burden, as measured by the autonomic symptom checklist (ASC) at baseline and follow-up visits. The primary outcomes were cognitive fluctuations measured by Clinician Assessment of Fluctuations (CAF) scores and neuropsychiatric burden as measured by Neuropsychiatric Inventory Questionnaire (NPI-Q) scores. Secondary outcomes included quality of life (QoL) captured through the Quality of Life-Alzheimer's Disease scale. Mixed-effects regression analyses were conducted to assess the effect of autonomic burden on each primary outcome, with age, sex, education, Charlson Comorbidity Index, anticholinergic burden, levodopa equivalent daily dosage, and EPWORTH sleepiness scale scores adjusted as potential confounders. We additionally conducted modified graphical network model analyses. A total of 189 patients with 745 longitudinal observations were included in the analysis. Mean age of the cohort was 74.92 years (SD 7.77 years) with 22% female participants. At baseline, ASC was directly associated with CAF (RC = 0.16; 95% CI 0.01-0.31;  Autonomic burden correlates with severity of cognitive fluctuations and neuropsychiatric burden in moderate-advanced DLB. It also correlates with the QoL of the caregiver over time. These results encourage investigation into novel potential therapeutic avenues in moderate-advanced DLB.
items.summary_ja:
背景：レビー小体型認知症（DLB）では認知の変動が90％にみられ、自律神経障害（ディスオートノミア）とともに障害の主要因とされる。本研究は、中等度から進行期のDLB患者における自律神経負荷と認知変動、神経精神症状負荷、生活の質（QoL）との関連を検討した。  
方法：米国の多施設共同前向き観察コホート研究PACE-DLBにて、189名の中等度～進行期DLB患者を対象に、自律神経症状チェックリスト（ASC）による自律神経負荷を基準および追跡時に測定。認知変動はClinician Assessment of Fluctuations（CAF）、神経精神症状負荷はNeuropsychiatric Inventory Questionnaire（NPI-Q）、QoLはQuality of Life-Alzheimer's Disease尺度で評価。混合効果回帰分析により年齢・性別などを調整し関連を解析。  
結果：745件の縦断的観察で、自律神経負荷は認知変動（CAFスコア）および神経精神症状負荷（NPI-Qスコア）と有意に正の相関を示した。また、介護者のQoLにも影響を及ぼすことが示された。  
結論：中等度から進行期DLBにおいて、自律神経負荷は認知変動や神経精神症状の重症度と関連し、介護者のQoLにも影響を与える。これらの知見は新たな治療法開発の可能性を示唆する。
items.summary_short_ja: レビー小体型認知症（DLB）の中等度から進行期患者189名を対象に、自律神経障害の負担が認知の変動や神経精神症状、生活の質（QoL）に与える影響を縦断的に調査した。自律神経負担は認知変動や神経精神症状の重症度と有意に関連し、介護者のQoLにも影響を及ぼすことが示された。これらの知見は、DLBの新たな治療法開発の可能性を示唆している。

items.title: Cognitive Fluctuations, Neuropsychiatric Burden, and Quality of Life in Moderate-Advanced Dementia With Lewy Bodies: The Role of Dysautonomia.
items.abstract: Cognitive fluctuations are reported in 90% of individuals with dementia with Lewy bodies (DLB) and along with dysautonomia, are a key source of disability. Through this effort, we sought to investigate the relationship between autonomic burden and cognitive fluctuations, neuropsychiatric burden and quality of life in moderate-advanced DLB. This multicenter, prospective, observational, longitudinal cohort study, Predicting ACcurately End-of-Life in Dementia With Lewy Bodies and Promoting Quality End-of-Life Experiences (PACE-DLB), was conducted in the United States to study individuals with moderate-advanced DLB. The primary exposure for the current analysis was time-varying total autonomic burden, as measured by the autonomic symptom checklist (ASC) at baseline and follow-up visits. The primary outcomes were cognitive fluctuations measured by Clinician Assessment of Fluctuations (CAF) scores and neuropsychiatric burden as measured by Neuropsychiatric Inventory Questionnaire (NPI-Q) scores. Secondary outcomes included quality of life (QoL) captured through the Quality of Life-Alzheimer's Disease scale. Mixed-effects regression analyses were conducted to assess the effect of autonomic burden on each primary outcome, with age, sex, education, Charlson Comorbidity Index, anticholinergic burden, levodopa equivalent daily dosage, and EPWORTH sleepiness scale scores adjusted as potential confounders. We additionally conducted modified graphical network model analyses. A total of 189 patients with 745 longitudinal observations were included in the analysis. Mean age of the cohort was 74.92 years (SD 7.77 years) with 22% female participants. At baseline, ASC was directly associated with CAF (RC = 0.16; 95% CI 0.01-0.31;  Autonomic burden correlates with severity of cognitive fluctuations and neuropsychiatric burden in moderate-advanced DLB. It also correlates with the QoL of the caregiver over time. These results encourage investigation into novel potential therapeutic avenues in moderate-advanced DLB.
items.summary_ja:
背景：レビー小体型認知症（DLB）では認知の変動が90％に見られ、自律神経障害（ディスオートノミア）とともに障害の主要因となっている。本研究は、中等度から進行期のDLB患者における自律神経負荷と認知変動、神経精神症状負荷、生活の質（QoL）との関連を調査した。

方法：米国の多施設共同前向き観察コホート研究PACE-DLBにて、189名の中等度から進行期DLB患者を対象に、基線および追跡時の自律神経症状チェックリスト（ASC）による自律神経負荷を測定。認知変動はClinician Assessment of Fluctuations（CAF）、神経精神症状負荷はNeuropsychiatric Inventory Questionnaire（NPI-Q）、QoLはQuality of Life-Alzheimer’s Disease尺度で評価。混合効果回帰分析により年齢、性別、教育歴などを調整して関連を検討した。

結果：745件の縦断的観察で、自律神経負荷は認知変動（CAFスコア）および神経精神症状負荷（NPI-Qスコア）と有意に正の相関を示した。また、介護者のQoLとも関連が認められた。

結論：中等度から進行期DLBにおいて、自律神経負荷は認知変動や神経精神症状の重症度と関連し、介護者の生活の質にも影響を及ぼす。これらの知見は新たな治療法開発の可能性を示唆する。
items.summary_short_ja: レビー小体型認知症（DLB）の中等度から進行期患者189名を対象に、自律神経障害の負担が認知機能の変動や神経精神症状の重症度、生活の質（QoL）に与える影響を縦断的に検討した。自律神経負担は認知変動や神経精神症状の悪化と有意に関連し、介護者のQoLにも影響を及ぼすことが示された。これらの知見はDLBの新たな治療戦略の開発に寄与する可能性がある。

items.title: Striatal Dopamine Transporter and Rest Tremor in Parkinson Disease: A Clinical Validation.
items.abstract: The mechanisms underlying tremor generation in Parkinson disease (PD) remain unclear. Previously, we demonstrated a connection between rest tremor amplitude and higher dopamine transporter (DAT) binding in the ipsilateral striatum among the Parkinson Progression Markers Initiative cohort. Here, we investigated the association of parkinsonian motor symptoms with striatal DAT binding in a sizable and clinically representative sample of patients with parkinsonian signs to validate the previously observed ipsilateral relationship in PD. This observational cross-sectional study included right-handed patients referred for [ At the end of the follow-up period, of the 414 patients included (median age 68 years [IQR 14], 49.4% female), 148 were evaluated to have PD and 79 other forms of parkinsonism with striatal DAT deficit. In total, 187 patients had normal binding. Among the patients with PD, left and right rest tremor amplitudes were positively associated with ipsilateral striatal DAT binding (β = +0.12 [95% CI +0.05, +0.19] and +0.10 [+0.05, +0.15] specific binding ratio [SBR] per point;  These findings confirm the positive association between rest tremor amplitude and ipsilateral striatal DAT binding in a clinical sample of PD patients. However, the non-PD groups were diagnostically heterogeneous, limiting conclusions about disease specificity.
items.summary_ja:
背景：パーキンソン病（PD）における振戦の発生メカニズムは未解明である。以前の研究で、PD患者の同側線条体におけるドパミントランスポーター（DAT）結合の増加と安静時振戦の振幅に関連が示唆された。  
方法：本研究は、パーキンソン症状を有する右利き患者414名（中央値年齢68歳、女性49.4％）を対象とした観察的横断研究で、線条体DAT結合とパーキンソン運動症状の関連を検証した。  
結果：PD患者148名のうち、左右の安静時振戦振幅はそれぞれ同側線条体DAT結合と正の相関を示した（β=＋0.12および＋0.10、95％信頼区間は有意）。一方、非PD群は診断的に多様であった。  
結論：PD患者において、安静時振戦の振幅と同側線条体DAT結合の正の関連が臨床的に確認された。ただし、非PD群の異質性により、この関連の疾患特異性については限定的な結論にとどまる。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究はパーキンソン病（PD）患者における安静時振戦の振幅と同側線条体ドパミントランスポーター（DAT）結合の関連を検証した。414名の患者を対象に解析した結果、PD患者では左右の安静時振戦振幅が同側線条体DAT結合と正の相関を示した。一方、非PD群は診断が多様であり、疾患特異性についての結論は限定的である。

items.title: Neurovascular Unit Dysfunction and Cerebral Small Vessel Disease in Parkinson Disease: A Systematic Review and a Meta Analysis.
items.abstract: Parkinson disease (PD) pathogenesis remains incompletely understood; beyond nigrostriatal loss, nondopaminergic mechanisms including neurovascular unit dysfunction may contribute to disability. Cerebral small vessel disease (CSVD) burden reflects neurovascular dysfunction in the form of white matter hyperintensities (WMH), lacunes, cerebral microbleeds (CMB), and enlarged perivascular spaces (ePVS). In PD cohorts, CSVD burden correlates with worse motor and gait scores. The aim of the study was to explore whether patients with PD exhibit greater CSVD burden than healthy controls (HC). We conducted a PRISMA-conformant systematic review and meta-analysis of studies including adults with idiopathic PD and a HC group that presented data comparing CSVD burden in these 2 groups. Six databases (MEDLINE, Embase, CINAHL Plus, CENTRAL, Scopus, and Web of Science) were searched on May 14 and 15, 2024. Two reviewers independently screened records, extracted data, and assessed risk of bias, with discrepancies resolved by consensus. Continuous outcomes were pooled as standardized mean differences (SMD); dichotomous outcomes as odds ratios (ORs). We evaluated small-study effects for pooled analyses with 10 or more studies using funnel plots and Egger regression test. We examined 13,403 records. Forty-six studies (45 cross-sectional) met inclusion criteria, totaling 3,817 PD and 2,593 HC (mean ages: 66.9 and 66.5, respectively). WMH volume (k = 21) was higher in PD (SMD 0.36, 95% CI 0.11-0.62). Visual ratings also indicated higher WMH in PD: global (k = 14) SMD 0.27 (95% CI 0.08-0.46); periventricular (k = 11) SMD 0.32 (95% CI 0.12-0.51); deep (k = 8) SMD 0.20 (95% CI 0.09-0.31). Differences in CMB (k = 6; OR 1.18, 95% CI 0.57-2.42) and lacunes (k = 4; OR 1.48, 95% CI 0.58-3.78) were not significant. ePVS results were heterogeneous but trended toward greater burden in PD, most notably in the midbrain (k = 3; SMD 1.80, 0.15-3.44). Overall evidence quality was rated as low, reflecting the observational nature of the included studies. Our analysis showed PD to be associated with greater WMH burden and increased midbrain ePVS. Pooled differences in CMB and lacunes were not significant. Substantial heterogeneity and cross-sectional designs limit certainty; standardized imaging and prospective cohorts are needed to define mechanisms and clinical implications.
items.summary_ja:
背景：パーキンソン病（PD）の病態は完全には解明されておらず、神経血管ユニット（NVU）機能障害が障害進行に関与すると考えられている。脳小血管病（CSVD）は白質高信号（WMH）、ラクーン、微小出血（CMB）、拡大血管周囲腔（ePVS）などで表され、PD患者の運動機能悪化と関連する。  
方法：PRISMA基準に準拠し、PD患者と健常対照（HC）を比較したCSVD負荷に関する研究を6データベースから系統的に検索・メタ解析した。合計46研究（PD 3,817例、HC 2,593例）を対象とした。  
結果：PD群はWMH体積（標準化平均差[SMD]0.36）および視覚評価による全体・脳室周囲・深部WMH（SMD 0.20～0.32）が有意に高かった。CMBおよびラクーンの差は有意でなかった。ePVSは中脳でPD群に多い傾向（SMD 1.80）を示したが、結果は異質性が大きかった。  
結論：PDはWMH負荷の増加および中脳のePVS増加と関連するが、CMBやラクーンの差は明確でない。観察研究中心で異質性が高いため、標準化された画像解析と前向き研究が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: パーキンソン病（PD）患者は健常者に比べ、白質高信号（WMH）や中脳の拡大血管周囲腔（ePVS）の負荷が有意に高いことが示された。一方、脳微小出血（CMB）やラクーンの差は有意でなかった。これらは神経血管ユニット機能障害を反映し、PDの運動障害に寄与する可能性があるが、研究の異質性や横断的デザインにより結論は限定的であり、標準化された画像解析と前向き研究が必要である。

items.title: Dynamic Smoking Patterns and Risk of Parkinson Disease and All-Cause Mortality: A Competing Risk Analysis Approach.
items.abstract: Smoking has been reported to be inversely associated with Parkinson disease (PD). However, the higher premature mortality among smokers may act as a competing risk, potentially confounding the inverse association. Because smoking behavior is dynamic, the long-term impact of changes among current smokers remains unclear. We investigated the association between longitudinal changes in smoking status and the risks of PD and all-cause mortality using a competing risk framework and an age-based time scale with left truncation. This large-scale retrospective cohort study included current smokers aged 40 years or older who participated in all 3 examination periods of the Korean National Health Screening. Based on longitudinal changes from the initial smoking status to 2 subsequent time points, participants were categorized into 4 groups: persistent smokers, recent quitters, sustained quitters, and relapsed smokers. Cumulative incidence functions for PD were estimated, with all-cause mortality as a competing event, and subdistribution hazard ratios (sHRs) with 95% CIs were obtained using Fine-Gray models. Data were obtained from 410,489 eligible participants (mean age 51.7 ± 9.0 years; 93.5% male). During a median 9.1-year follow-up, persistent smokers exhibited the lowest risk of PD. Both recent quitters and sustained quitters had higher PD risk than persistent smokers (sHR 1.60 [1.41-1.82] and 1.61 [1.42-1.81]), whereas relapsed smokers did not differ from persistent smokers (sHR 1.05 [0.87-1.28]). For all-cause mortality, recent and sustained quitters had 3% and 17% lower risks, respectively, compared with persistent smokers, whereas relapsed smokers showed no significant difference. The observed pattern of PD risk was suggested to be primarily associated with current smoking status rather than cumulative smoking exposure, as relapsed smokers and recent quitters, who had the same number of smoking time points, showed distinctly different risks. Furthermore, 1 time point (∼2 years) of short-term abstinence did not attenuate the protective association. Mortality was lowest in sustained quitters while recent quitters showed a marginal trend toward lower risk, supporting the benefit of early cessation. Interpretation should be cautious because smoking status was assessed at 3 time points, subsequent changes were unknown, and most participants were male.
items.summary_ja:
背景：喫煙はパーキンソン病（PD）と逆相関すると報告されているが、喫煙者の早期死亡が競合リスクとして影響し、関連性の解釈を複雑にしている。喫煙行動は動的であり、長期的な変化の影響は不明である。  
方法：韓国国民健康診断の40歳以上の現喫煙者41万人超を対象に、3回の検診時点での喫煙状態の変化に基づき「持続喫煙者」「最近禁煙者」「持続禁煙者」「再喫煙者」の4群に分類。競合リスク解析（Fine-Grayモデル）を用いてPD発症と全死亡リスクを評価した。  
結果：中央値9.1年の追跡で、持続喫煙者が最もPDリスクが低く、最近禁煙者・持続禁煙者はそれぞれ約1.6倍のリスク増加を示した。再喫煙者のリスクは持続喫煙者と差がなかった。死亡リスクは持続禁煙者が最も低く、最近禁煙者もわずかに低かった。短期禁煙（約2年）ではPDリスクの低減効果は見られなかった。  
結論：PDリスクの低減は累積喫煙量よりも現喫煙状態に強く関連し、短期禁煙では保護効果が得られにくい。一方、死亡リスク低減は禁煙の継続が重要である。解析は喫煙状態が3時点のみで男性主体のため慎重な解釈が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、韓国の40歳以上の現喫煙者41万人超を対象に、喫煙パターンの変化とパーキンソン病（PD）および全死亡リスクの関連を競合リスク解析で検討した。持続喫煙者はPDリスクが最も低く、禁煙者はPDリスクが高い一方、死亡リスクは禁煙者で低下した。短期禁煙（約2年）ではPDリスクの低減効果は見られず、PDリスクは現喫煙状態に強く依存することが示唆された。

items.title: Incidence and Survival Rates of Frontotemporal Lobar Degeneration: Population-Based Registry Study.
items.abstract: Frontotemporal lobar degeneration (FTLD) can present as a behavioral or language variant (bvFTLD or a primary progressive aphasia [PPA], or as a syndrome with parkinsonism, such as corticobasal syndrome [CBS] or progressive supranuclear palsy [PSP]). The incidence of FTLD varies in epidemiologic studies, reaching 3 per 100,000 person-years. Only few data exist regarding survival times. We evaluated incidence and survival rates in a population-based registry with high coverage in Southern Germany. The epidemiologic ALS-FTLD registry Swabia covers a population of 8.4 million inhabitants in south-west Germany. Raw and age-standardized incidence rates, as well as incidence rate ratios (IRR) with 95% CIs were calculated. Median survival time was estimated for different FTLD variants using the Kaplan-Meier method. Between 2015 and 2022, 515 patients with FTLD (mean age at diagnosis 68.0 ± 9.5 years, 59.8% men) were registered. The median diagnostic delay was 24.8 months. The most common variant was bvFTLD (n = 185, 35.9%; 66.5% men), followed by PPA (n = 147, 28.5%; 51.0% men), PSP (n = 133, 25.8%; 62.9% men), and CBS (n = 22, 4.3%; 50% men). The overall FTLD incidence was 0.77 (95% CI 0.71-0.84), and the age-standardized incidence was 0.76 (95% CI 0.69-0.82) per 100.000 person-years. The age-standardized incidence was higher in men than in women, with an IRR of 1.73 (95% CI 1.44-2.00). In men, incidence increased from the age 50 years, primarily due to bvFTD, whereas in women this rise was primarily due to PSP. The median survival (N = 392) from diagnosis was 53.6 months (95% CI 50.9-62.0) overall, 73.1 months (95% CI 63.6-82.8) for patients with PPA, 42.8 months (95% CI 35.1-64.3) for patients with bvFTD, and 49.5 months (95% CI 39.2-53.7) for patients with PPS/CBS. We observed a raw incidence rate of 0.77, thus considerably lower than in most previous reports. Incidence was substantially higher in men than in women. The prognosis from the time of diagnosis depended highly on the specific FTLD subtype. Our data are based on the large sample size and high capture rate of a central European population-based registry.
items.summary_ja:
【背景】前頭側頭葉変性症（FTLD）は行動異常型（bvFTLD）、進行性失語症（PPA）、およびパーキンソニズムを伴う症候群（CBS、PSP）として現れるが、発症率や生存期間に関するデータは限られている。  
【方法】ドイツ南西部の840万人を対象としたALS-FTLD登録システムにより、2015～2022年に登録された515例のFTLD患者の発症率と生存率を解析。年齢調整発症率や発症率比（IRR）、Kaplan-Meier法による生存期間中央値を算出した。  
【結果】全体の年齢調整発症率は100,000人年あたり0.76で、男性は女性より1.73倍高かった。男性は50歳以降にbvFTLDが増加し、女性はPSPの増加が主因であった。生存期間中央値は全体で約54か月、PPAで73か月、bvFTLDで43か月、PSP/CBSで50か月であった。  
【結論】FTLDの発症率は従来報告より低く、男性で高頻度であることが示された。診断後の予後はFTLDの亜型により大きく異なる。大規模な地域登録に基づく信頼性の高い疫学データである。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究はドイツ南部の人口ベース登録を用いて、前頭側頭葉変性症（FTLD）の発症率と生存率を調査した。2015～2022年に515例を登録し、全体の発症率は人口10万人年あたり0.77で、男性が女性より1.73倍高かった。主な亜型は行動変異型bvFTLD、進行性失語症PPA、進行性核上性麻痺PSPで、生存期間は亜型により異なり、PPAが最も長かった。診断後の予後は亜型依存性であることが示された。

items.title: How Are Synaptic Vesicle Exocytosis and Endocytosis Affected in Parkinson Disease?
items.abstract: Synaptic vesicle exocytosis and endocytosis are 2 fundamental processes that involve the coordinated and timely activity of many proteins and protein-lipid interactions. Alpha-synuclein (α-Syn) regulates several steps of these processes. Impaired exocytosis and endocytosis are important consequences of Parkinson disease (PD), reflecting both loss of function of normal α-Syn and toxic gain of function of abnormal α-Syn aggregates. Studies in familial forms of PD indicate that abnormal functions of other critical proteins such as leucine repeat rich kinase 2 also impair normal synaptic vesicular trafficking and contribute to synaptic dysfunction and secondary neurodegeneration.
items.summary_ja:
背景：シナプス小胞のエキソサイトーシスとエンドサイトーシスは、多数のタンパク質や脂質の相互作用によって調節される基本的な神経伝達過程である。α-シヌクレイン（α-Syn）はこれらの過程の複数段階を制御している。  
方法：パーキンソン病（PD）におけるシナプス小胞の機能障害を、α-Synの正常機能喪失と異常凝集体による毒性獲得機能の観点から検討し、家族性PDに関連する他の重要タンパク質、特にルイシンリピートリッチキナーゼ2（LRRK2）の異常機能がシナプス小胞輸送に与える影響を調査した。  
結果：PDでは、α-Synの異常がエキソサイトーシスとエンドサイトーシスの障害を引き起こし、シナプス機能不全をもたらすことが示された。さらに、LRRK2などの他のタンパク質の異常もシナプス小胞の正常な輸送を妨げ、神経変性を促進することが明らかとなった。  
結論：PDにおけるシナプス小胞の機能障害は、α-Synの機能異常と他の関連タンパク質の異常が複合的に関与しており、これらの分子機構の解明が病態理解と治療戦略の開発に重要である。
items.summary_short_ja: シナプス小胞のエキソサイトーシスとエンドサイトーシスは多くのタンパク質の協調的な働きによる基本的過程であり、α-シヌクレイン（α-Syn）がこれらの過程を調節する。パーキンソン病（PD）では、正常なα-Synの機能喪失と異常なα-Syn凝集体の毒性獲得により、これらの過程が障害される。さらに、LRRK2など他の重要タンパク質の異常もシナプス機能障害と神経変性に寄与する。

items.title: Striatal Dopamine Transporter and Rest Tremor in Parkinson Disease: A Clinical Validation.
items.abstract: The mechanisms underlying tremor generation in Parkinson disease (PD) remain unclear. Previously, we demonstrated a connection between rest tremor amplitude and higher dopamine transporter (DAT) binding in the ipsilateral striatum among the Parkinson Progression Markers Initiative cohort. Here, we investigated the association of parkinsonian motor symptoms with striatal DAT binding in a sizable and clinically representative sample of patients with parkinsonian signs to validate the previously observed ipsilateral relationship in PD. This observational cross-sectional study included right-handed patients referred for [ At the end of the follow-up period, of the 414 patients included (median age 68 years [IQR 14], 49.4% female), 148 were evaluated to have PD and 79 other forms of parkinsonism with striatal DAT deficit. In total, 187 patients had normal binding. Among the patients with PD, left and right rest tremor amplitudes were positively associated with ipsilateral striatal DAT binding (β = +0.12 [95% CI +0.05, +0.19] and +0.10 [+0.05, +0.15] specific binding ratio [SBR] per point;  These findings confirm the positive association between rest tremor amplitude and ipsilateral striatal DAT binding in a clinical sample of PD patients. However, the non-PD groups were diagnostically heterogeneous, limiting conclusions about disease specificity.
items.summary_ja:
背景：パーキンソン病（PD）における振戦の発生メカニズムは未解明である。以前の研究で、PD患者の同側線条体におけるドパミントランスポーター（DAT）結合の増加と安静時振戦の振幅に関連が示唆された。  
方法：本研究は、パーキンソン症状を呈する右利き患者414名（中央値年齢68歳、女性49.4％）を対象とした横断的観察研究で、線条体DAT結合とパーキンソン症状の関連を検証した。  
結果：414名中、148名がPD、79名が線条体DAT欠損を伴う他のパーキンソン症候群と診断され、187名は正常なDAT結合を示した。PD患者では左右の安静時振戦振幅が同側線条体DAT結合と正の相関を示した（β=+0.12および+0.10、95％信頼区間いずれもプラス）。  
結論：PD患者の臨床サンプルにおいて、安静時振戦振幅と同側線条体DAT結合の正の関連が確認された。ただし、非PD群の診断が多様であるため、疾患特異性についての結論は限定的である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究はパーキンソン病（PD）患者における安静時振戦と線条体ドパミントランスポーター（DAT）結合の関連を検証した。414名の患者を対象に解析した結果、PD患者では左右の安静時振戦振幅が同側の線条体DAT結合と正の相関を示した。一方、非PD群は診断的に多様であり、疾患特異性の判断は困難であった。これにより、PDにおける振戦発生機序の一端が示唆された。

items.title: Coffee and Tea Intake, Dementia Risk, and Cognitive Function.
items.abstract: Evidence linking coffee and tea to cognitive health remains inconclusive, and most studies fail to differentiate caffeinated from decaffeinated coffee. To investigate associations of coffee and tea intake with dementia risk and cognitive function. Prospective cohort study that included female participants from the Nurses' Health Study (NHS; n = 86 606 with data from 1980-2023) and male participants from the Health Professionals Follow-up Study (HPFS; n = 45 215 with data from 1986-2023) who did not have cancer, Parkinson disease, or dementia at study entry (baseline) in the US. The primary exposures were intakes of caffeinated coffee, decaffeinated coffee, and tea. Dietary intake was collected every 2 to 4 years using validated food frequency questionnaires. The primary outcome was dementia, which was identified via death records and physician diagnoses. The secondary outcomes included subjective cognitive decline assessed by a questionnaire-based score (range, 0-7; higher scores indicate greater perceived decline; cases defined as those with a score ≥3) and objective cognitive function assessed only in the NHS cohort using telephone-based neuropsychological tests such as the Telephone Interview for Cognitive Status (TICS) score (range, 0-41) and a measure of global cognition (a standardized mean z score for all 6 administered cognitive tests). Among 131 821 participants (mean age at baseline, 46.2 [SD, 7.2] years in the NHS cohort and 53.8 [SD, 9.7] years in the HPFS cohort; 65.7% were female) during up to 43 years of follow-up (median, 36.8 years; IQR, 28-42 years), there were 11 033 cases of incident dementia. After adjusting for potential confounders and pooling results across cohorts, higher caffeinated coffee intake was significantly associated with lower dementia risk (141 vs 330 cases per 100 000 person-years comparing the fourth [highest] quartile of consumption with the first [lowest] quartile; hazard ratio, 0.82 [95% CI, 0.76 to 0.89]) and lower prevalence of subjective cognitive decline (7.8% vs 9.5%, respectively; prevalence ratio, 0.85 [95% CI, 0.78 to 0.93]). In the NHS cohort, higher caffeinated coffee intake was also associated with better objective cognitive performance. Compared with participants in the lowest quartile, those in the highest quartile had a higher mean TICS score (mean difference, 0.11 [95% CI, 0.01 to 0.21]) and a higher mean global cognition score (mean difference, 0.02 [95% CI, -0.01 to 0.04]); however, the association with global cognition was not statistically significant (P = .06). Higher intake of tea showed similar associations with these cognitive outcomes, whereas decaffeinated coffee intake was not associated with lower dementia risk or better cognitive performance. A dose-response analysis showed nonlinear inverse associations of caffeinated coffee and tea intake levels with dementia risk and subjective cognitive decline. The most pronounced associated differences were observed with intake of approximately 2 to 3 cups per day of caffeinated coffee or 1 to 2 cups per day of tea. Greater consumption of caffeinated coffee and tea was associated with lower risk of dementia and modestly better cognitive function, with the most pronounced association at moderate intake levels.
items.summary_ja:
背景：コーヒーやお茶の摂取と認知機能や認知症リスクの関連は明確でなく、多くの研究でカフェイン入りとカフェイン抜きの区別がされていない。  
方法：米国の看護師健康研究（NHS、女性86,606名）と健康専門職追跡研究（HPFS、男性45,215名）を対象に、1980～2023年のデータを用いた前向きコホート研究。カフェイン入りコーヒー、カフェイン抜きコーヒー、お茶の摂取量を2～4年ごとに食事頻度調査で評価し、認知症発症（死亡記録・医師診断）や主観的認知低下、NHSでは電話による認知機能検査も実施。  
結果：131,821名を最大43年追跡し、11,033件の認知症発症を確認。カフェイン入りコーヒーの摂取が多いほど認知症リスクが低く（最高摂取群のハザード比0.82）、主観的認知低下の有病率も低かった。また、NHSでは認知機能スコアも高かった。お茶の摂取も同様の関連を示したが、カフェイン抜きコーヒーは関連なし。摂取量とリスクの関係は非線形で、カフェイン入りコーヒーは1日2～3杯、お茶は1～2杯で最も効果的だった。  
結論：カフェイン入りコーヒーとお茶の適度な摂取は認知症リスクの低下および認知機能の改善と関連し、カフェイン抜きコーヒーにはその効果が認められなかった。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、米国の大規模コホートを対象に、カフェイン入りコーヒー・紅茶の摂取と認知症リスクおよび認知機能の関連を調査した。約43年の追跡で、カフェイン入りコーヒーや紅茶の適度な摂取（コーヒー2～3杯、紅茶1～2杯/日）が認知症リスクの低下と主観的・客観的認知機能の改善と関連した。一方、デカフェコーヒーには有意な効果は認められなかった。

items.title: Incidence and Survival Rates of Frontotemporal Lobar Degeneration: Population-Based Registry Study.
items.abstract: Frontotemporal lobar degeneration (FTLD) can present as a behavioral or language variant (bvFTLD or a primary progressive aphasia [PPA], or as a syndrome with parkinsonism, such as corticobasal syndrome [CBS] or progressive supranuclear palsy [PSP]). The incidence of FTLD varies in epidemiologic studies, reaching 3 per 100,000 person-years. Only few data exist regarding survival times. We evaluated incidence and survival rates in a population-based registry with high coverage in Southern Germany. The epidemiologic ALS-FTLD registry Swabia covers a population of 8.4 million inhabitants in south-west Germany. Raw and age-standardized incidence rates, as well as incidence rate ratios (IRR) with 95% CIs were calculated. Median survival time was estimated for different FTLD variants using the Kaplan-Meier method. Between 2015 and 2022, 515 patients with FTLD (mean age at diagnosis 68.0 ± 9.5 years, 59.8% men) were registered. The median diagnostic delay was 24.8 months. The most common variant was bvFTLD (n = 185, 35.9%; 66.5% men), followed by PPA (n = 147, 28.5%; 51.0% men), PSP (n = 133, 25.8%; 62.9% men), and CBS (n = 22, 4.3%; 50% men). The overall FTLD incidence was 0.77 (95% CI 0.71-0.84), and the age-standardized incidence was 0.76 (95% CI 0.69-0.82) per 100.000 person-years. The age-standardized incidence was higher in men than in women, with an IRR of 1.73 (95% CI 1.44-2.00). In men, incidence increased from the age 50 years, primarily due to bvFTD, whereas in women this rise was primarily due to PSP. The median survival (N = 392) from diagnosis was 53.6 months (95% CI 50.9-62.0) overall, 73.1 months (95% CI 63.6-82.8) for patients with PPA, 42.8 months (95% CI 35.1-64.3) for patients with bvFTD, and 49.5 months (95% CI 39.2-53.7) for patients with PPS/CBS. We observed a raw incidence rate of 0.77, thus considerably lower than in most previous reports. Incidence was substantially higher in men than in women. The prognosis from the time of diagnosis depended highly on the specific FTLD subtype. Our data are based on the large sample size and high capture rate of a central European population-based registry.
items.summary_ja:
背景：前頭側頭葉変性症（FTLD）は行動変異型（bvFTLD）、進行性失語症（PPA）、およびパーキンソニズムを伴う症候群（CBSやPSP）として現れる。発症率や生存期間に関する疫学データは限られている。  
方法：ドイツ南部の840万人を対象としたALS-FTLD登録システムにより、2015～2022年に登録された515例のFTLD患者の発症率と生存率を解析。年齢調整発症率と発症率比（IRR）、カプランマイヤー法で中央値生存期間を算出した。  
結果：全体の年齢調整発症率は100,000人年あたり0.76で、男性は女性より1.73倍高かった。男性は50歳以降にbvFTLDが増加し、女性はPSPが主な増加要因であった。中央値生存期間は全体で約54ヶ月、PPAで73ヶ月、bvFTLDで43ヶ月、PSP/CBSで約50ヶ月であった。  
結論：本研究は中央ヨーロッパの大規模登録に基づき、FTLDの発症率は過去報告より低く、男性で高いことを示した。生存期間はFTLDの亜型によって大きく異なり、診断後の予後評価に重要な知見を提供する。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は南ドイツの人口ベース登録データを用いて、前頭側頭葉変性症（FTLD）の発症率と生存率を調査した。2015～2022年に515例を登録し、全体の年齢調整発症率は10万人年あたり0.76で、男性が女性より1.73倍高かった。診断後の中央値生存期間は約54か月で、亜型により差があり、PPAが最長、bvFTLDが最短であった。発症率は従来報告より低く、性別や亜型による予後差が明確であった。
